The Ark Enters the Temple

2
Literal
Traditional

That is, the Feast of Tabernacles (or Booths or Shelters); similarly in verse 65; see Leviticus 23:33–36.

Ethanim was the seventh month of the ancient Hebrew lunar calendar, usually occurring within the months of September and October.
